runners.formComment: Back from a 12 weeks spell and last resumed over 440m at Goulburn where she was in the placings, finishing second. Is a danger.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Mix 3/4 on March 31 over 388m at Gosford behind Let's Trot Fox beaten 5.5 lengths (23.17). Last couple have been below par. Deserves another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for racing room in the back straight and lost ground.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.86) in a Grade 5, finishing a 6 length fourth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from five starts. Looks a key chance on best form.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.95) in a Mix 1/2/3, finishing a 3.5 lengths sixth. Yet to win but has placed four times from this draw. Will need some luck to feature.

runners.formComment: Last start finished sixth over 400m at Bulli, beaten 13 lengths (23.60) behind Midnight Star in a Mix 3/4 on March 31. Others make more appeal.

formComments.comment: Last start finished sixth over 400m at Bulli, beaten 13 lengths (23.60) behind Midnight Star in a Mix 3/4 on March 31. Others make more appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the turn to the home straight and shifted out.
Slow away; Nearing the 100m mark appeared to put in a few awkward strides.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 324m in 17.49. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 324m at this track at Grade 4 level. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

runners.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when second (17.83) over 324m at this track. Has a decent strike-rate from the draw and can measure up.
